description_long: This is a three-armed candelabrum with a central stem and a wide, stable base, designed in a classic style reminiscent of antique candle holders. Each of the three arms curves outward and upward, supporting a candle socket with a realistic wax candle, complete with detailed wax drips down the sides. The body and arms of the lamp are made of a metallic material, likely cast iron or painted steel, with subtle decorative engravings and a slightly weathered, matte finish. The candles themselves are rendered in a pale, off-white color with reddish-brown wax drips, adding to the aged and used appearance. The base is hexagonal and flares outward, providing stability and a touch of geometric elegance. This lamp would be suitable for outdoor urban settings such as parks, plazas, or historical districts, where decorative and functional lighting is desired.
description: A classic three-armed metal candelabrum with realistic wax candles and ornate detailing, featuring a wide hexagonal base and curved arms.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three candle arms and the ornate central stem with detailed wax drips on each candle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the alignment of the three candles in a row and the thickness of the central stem and base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all three candle arms visible and the decorative engravings on the arms and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the three candles in a line and the robust, flared base.
